# opnsense_monit_service (Resource)

Manages a monit service on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Service name.
- `type` (String) Service type (process, file, host, system, network, ...).

### Optional

- `address` (String) Address (host/network types).
- `description` (String) Description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this service check is enabled.
- `interface` (String) Interface (network type).
- `match` (String) Process match string.
- `path` (String) Path (file/filesystem types).
- `pidfile` (String) PID file path (process type).
- `start` (String) Start program command.
- `start_timeout` (Number) Start timeout in seconds.
- `stop` (String) Stop program command.
- `tests` (Set of String) UUIDs of monit tests applied to this service.
- `timeout` (Number) Restart timeout in seconds.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
